assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertions.evidence: Found exact row preserved: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' on line 16 of claude-md-result.md. All four values match the originals.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertions.evidence: Found new row on line 17: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. The Serena Instance is serena_ui as required.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged
assertions.evidence: All five Jira fields are present and unchanged on lines 20-24: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.

assertions.assertion: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertions.evidence: changes-log.md has a '## Preserved (No Changes)' section listing trustify-backend, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Limitations (serena_backend), Bug Configuration, and Documentation. It also has a '## Added' section listing the new trustify-ui row and serena_ui limitations entry. Clear distinction between preserved and added.

assertions.assertion: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertions.evidence: discovery-log.md Discovered Instances table shows: 'serena_backend | Already configured | 10 (...)' and 'serena_ui | New — not yet in Registry | 10 (...)'. Both statuses are clearly indicated.

assertions.assertion: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertions.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 28-43 preserve the tool prefix convention ('mcp__<instance>__<tool>'), the serena_backend find_symbol example, and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). The only addition is line 43: 'serena_ui: No known limitations'.

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Bug Configuration section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertions.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 45-49 show Bug Configuration preserved: Bug issue type ID: 10001, Bug template: docs/bug-template.md, Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks. discovery-log.md states 'Bug configuration already present in existing CLAUDE.md. No changes needed.' changes-log.md lists Bug Configuration under Preserved.

assertions.assertion: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no Security Configuration section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertions.evidence: discovery-log.md states 'User declined security triage configuration. Security Configuration section not added.' changes-log.md lists under 'Not Added': 'Security Configuration: User declined security triage setup; section not added.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section anywhere in the file.
